summary: Tested opportunity logger background task, /opportunity-log-stats, /clear-opportunity-log, /backtest-strategies (validation + correctness + date range + empty), TTL index, and the /backtest frontend page. All 9 pytest cases passed and frontend UI works end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~923 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting routes (backtest, telegram, daily-summary) into separate router modules.

Backtest simulator throttle uses opportunity-log timestamps (sparse 30s+ logs), so the 30s/coin throttle rarely filters anything in practice — semantics match auto_exec but in a degenerate way. Acceptable for current dataset granularity, but document this if future logging frequency increases.
opportunity_logger_task swallows individual insert exceptions silently (try/except pass at line 203). Acceptable but consider counting/logging duplicates for observability.
/backtest-strategies uses .to_list(length=200_000) — fine for now, but add pagination if dataset grows.
seed_data_creation: 6 synthetic opportunity_log docs seeded then cleaned up via pytest fixture (SOL x3, JUP x2, RAY x1). Live opportunity_log was also cleared then auto-repopulated by logger task within ~30s (verified 20-30 docs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All previous iteration test files still in /app/backend/tests/. This iteration's new file is /app/backend/tests/test_opp_log_and_backtest.py. Opportunity logger runs every 5s, throttles 30s/coin, TTL=7d. Backtest simulator at /api/backtest-strategies. Frontend /backtest page works. server.py size is creeping up — flag if it crosses 1000 lines.
verified_features: GET /opportunity-log-stats returns correct shape {count, from_ts, to_ts, by_coin[]}; per-coin avg/max spread present
POST /clear-opportunity-log returns {deleted, status:'ok'} and stats.count drops to 0
POST /backtest-strategies validation: empty configs->400, >5->400, bad ISO date->400
Backtest correctness with seeded data: threshold 0.1 -> 3 trades ($1.15), threshold 0.3 -> 2 trades, threshold 0.5 -> 1 trade. Winner field correct.
Backtest empty dataset returns opportunities_count=0, results=[], winner=null
Date range filter (from_date/to_date) limits opportunities correctly (3 within 15s window)
TTL index exists on 'ts' with expireAfterSeconds=604800
Logger runs ~30s with no exceptions in backend logs; logged 20+ docs

Frontend /backtest: all data-testids present (nav-backtest-link, btn-run-backtest, btn-clear-opp-log, backtest-name-0..2, backtest-threshold-0..2, backtest-slippage-0..2). Run Backtest renders backtest-results + backtest-row-0..2. Clear Log confirm-dialog flow works and toast shows.
